channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Facebook Users Automatically Following Trump After Inauguration
item.description: Some Facebook and Instagram users were surprised to find themselves automatically following President Donald Trump's accounts after his inauguration, but it's likely due to their previous following of official U.S. government accounts.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
